attachments.fallback: How to Migrate MBOX to Zoho Mail? - @prunellasherman

attachments.text: It’s possible to use the BLR Tools MBOX Converter Tool if you’re trying to find a way to convert MBOX files to MSG. attachments.fallback: How to Convert OST Files to DOC - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to convert OST files to DOC, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/ost-to-pst-converter.php|SysInfo OST to PST Converter>. It converts single or bulk OST files including all emails, contacts, and tasks to PST, MBOX, EML, HTML, and more. You can even directly import OST data into Gmail, Office 365, and G Suite. Features like a mail filter, duplicate removal, and folder hierarchy maintenance ensure a smooth …
